author: studiogamma
description: Hide specific tag nodes from Graph View by converting tags to plain text (e.g. #Year → —#Year). Unhide to restore them. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: studiogamma
releases.description:
## Update (v 1.0 -> v 1.1)
The backend logic has been optimized for better performance. In testing, performance is now 3x faster for vaults with 1,000+ files.
